title: Ferne Park Estate overhead line (FCT327), S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  29 October 2025  Location   Ferne Park EstateCranborne ChaseWiltshireEngland   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line.
